title: Coordinates
description: Geographic coordinates for an entity. Phase 0 supports point geometry only; polygon and bounding-box geometry types are reserved in the enum for Phase 0.3+ but MUST NOT be instantiated in v0.1.0. The default coordinate reference system is WGS84 (EPSG:4326). Coordinates are decimal degrees, signed (negative latitudes south of equator, negative longitudes west of prime meridian).

lat.description: Decimal-degree latitude in WGS84. North-positive. Range is closed: -90 (south pole) to 90 (north pole) inclusive.

lon.description: Decimal-degree longitude in WGS84. East-positive. Range is closed: -180 to 180 inclusive.

precision_meters.description: Radius of positional uncertainty around the (lat, lon) point, in metres. A value of 0 means submetre precision; a value of 50000 means '~50 km centroid'. Omit if unknown; do not encode as 0.

geometry_type.description: Geometry kind. Phase 0 release accepts only 'point'; 'polygon' and 'bbox' are reserved for Phase 0.3+ and currently fail validation in pipeline (see iac:phase-0-geometry-only constraint).

crs.description: Coordinate reference system URI. Default WGS84 (EPSG:4326). Other CRS values trigger a transformation step in the export pipeline.

type.description: Categorical uncertainty: 'exact' = surveyed; 'centroid' = polygon centroid taken as point; 'approximate' = informed estimate from sources; 'unlocated' = referenced but not geolocatable; 'disputed' = scholarly disagreement on identification.

note.description: Free-text note explaining the uncertainty (e.g., 'centroid of the larger Bilād al-Shām reference region').

derived_from_source.description: Identifier of the primary source that supplied these coordinates. Format is a CURIE-like string ('yaqut:7842', 'le-strange:312', 'manual:cetinkaya') or an iac PID ('iac:source-00000001' once source namespace is live).

$comment: Phase 0 geometry constraint: only geometry_type='point' is currently exported and validated. Pipelines/transformers/validate_phase0_geometry.py enforces this until Phase 0.3 polygons are activated.
